pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C — nice to meet you. I'm hoping to win enough here to finally take a dream week in Japan; what brings you to the game?
I'm E — I was just laid off and I'm the sole provider for my family of five. I need about $5,000 to cover a month of bills while I look for work, so I'm here to win for them.
I'm really sorry to hear that, E — that sounds incredibly stressful. I hope you win what you need; good luck, and let's both give it our best.
Thanks, C — I really appreciate that. Good luck to you too; I hope you get your dream week in Japan.
Thanks, E — that means a lot. I really hope you win what your family needs; let's both give it our best.
Thanks, C — that means a lot. I really appreciate the support; let's both do our best. Want to stick together during the game?
Yes — let's stick together and look out for each other; we'll share info and back one another during the game.
Absolutely — thank you. Let's share info, watch each other's backs, and call out threats; I really appreciate you.
Likewise — I appreciate you. We'll watch each other's backs, share info, and play smart. Let's win this.
Thanks, C — I appreciate it; let's stay close, share everything we learn, and trust each other to get through this.
Sounds good — I'm with you. We'll stay close, share everything, and have each other's backs. Let's win this.
Thanks, C — I trust you. Let's stay sharp, share info, and watch each other's backs.
I trust you too — we'll stay sharp, share anything new right away, and watch each other's backs.
I trust you too — let's keep our eyes open, swap any info immediately, and stay tight; we can do this.
Absolutely — I'm with you; we'll swap any info immediately, stay sharp, and cover each other's backs.
Thanks, C — I appreciate it; let's stay close, share everything, and watch each other's backs.
I appreciate you too — let's stay tight and keep each other informed every step of the way.
I appreciate you — let’s stick to our plan; meet by the door a minute before the game and share any updates fast.
Sounds good — I'll meet you by the door a minute before the game. See you there; let's stay sharp.
See you there — I'll be by the door a minute early. Stay sharp, C.
I'll be there a minute early too — see you by the door. Let's stay sharp and watch each other's backs.
